data.markdown:
<::Site Plan: figure::>GOODYEAR SITE PLAN NOTES1. IMPROVEMENTS MADE WITHIN A CITY RIGHT-OF-WAY, TRACT, OR EASEMENT THAT WILL BE MAINTAINED IN THE FUTURE BY THE CITY OF GOODYEAR SHALL BE CLEARLY IDENTIFIES ON THE APPROVED PLANS AND ARE SUBJECT TO THE FOLLOWING REQUIREMENTS. IMPROVEMENTS MAY INCLUDE BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO STREET SURFACES, CURB, GUTTER, SIDEWALKS, RAMPS, DRIVEWAYS, TURN BAYS, BUS BAYS, STREET LIGHTING, SIGNAGE, AND STRIPING. LANDSCAPE RESPONSIBILITIES ARE IDENTIFIED UNDER SEPARATE NOTE:a. THE DEVELOPER SHALL MAINTAIN AND WARRANTY ALL IMPROVEMENTS FOR A PERIOD OF TWO YEARS BEGINNING IMMEDIATELY AFTER THE CITY ISSUES THE NOTIFICATION OF APPROVAL FOR THE PROJECT.b. DURING THE MAINTENANCE AND WARRANTY PERIOD, THE DEVELOPER SHALL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR MAINTAINING ADEQUATE PROTECTION OF ALL IMPROVEMENTS. ANY DAMAGED IMPROVEMENTS SHALL BE IMMEDIATELY REPAIRED OR REPLACED AT THE DEVELOPER'S EXPENSE.c. MAINTENANCE SHALL INCLUDE BUT IS NOT LIMITED TO STREET SWEEPING, APPLICATION OF SEALANT IN ALL PAVEMENT CRACKS AND JOINTS, AND APPLICATION OF SEALANT OVER ALL ASPHALT PAVEMENTS.d. AT THE TERMINATION OF THE MAINTENANCE AND WARRANTY PERIOD, ALL IMPROVEMENTS SHALL BE UNDAMAGED AND SHALL MEET CITY STANDARDS.e. IF ALL IMPROVEMENTS ARE NOT ACCEPTABLE AT THE END OF THE TWO-YEAR PERIOD, THE MAINTENANCE AND WARRANTY PERIOD SHALL CONTINUE UNTIL THE IMPROVEMENTS MEET CITY APPROVAL.2. LANDSCAPED AREAS THAT WILL BE MAINTAINED IN THE FUTURE BY THE CITY OF GOODYEAR SHALL BE CLEARLY IDENTIFIED ON THE APPROVED PLANS AND ARE SUBJECT TO THE FOLLOWING REQUIREMENTS. THESE AREAS MAY INCLUDE RETENTION BASINS, PARKS, RIGHTS-OF-WAY, AND STREET CENTER MEDIAN LANDSCAPING.a. THE DEVELOPER SHALL MAINTAIN AND WARRANTY ALL LANDSCAPE IMPROVEMENTS, INCLUDING PLANTED AREAS AND IRRIGATION SYSTEMS FOR A PERIOD OF TWO YEARS BEGINNING IMMEDIATELY AFTER THE CITY ISSUES THE NOTIFICATION OF APPROVAL FOR THE PROJECT.b. DURING THE MAINTENANCE AND WARRANTY PERIOD, THE DEVELOPER SHALL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR MAINTAINING ADEQUATE PROTECTION OF ALL AREAS. ANY DAMAGED PLANTING AND/OR IRRIGATION SYSTEMS SHALL BE IMMEDIATELY REPAIRED OR REPLACED AT THE DEVELOPER'S EXPENSE.c. MAINTENANCE SHALL INCLUDE CONTINUOUS OPERATIONS OF WATERING, WEEDING, REMOVAL OF DEAD PLANT MATERIAL, MOWING, ROLLING, FERTILIZING, SPRAYING, REPLACEMENT, AND ALL OTHER MEASURES NECESSARY TO ENSURE NORMAL HEALTHY GROWTH.d. WHEN THE TURF HAS ESTABLISHED SUFFICIENT ROOT STRUCTURE AND HAS OBTAINED AN APPROXIMATE HEIGHT OF 3 INCHES, MOWING SHALL BEGIN IMMEDIATELY TO ARCHIVE A TURF HEIGHT OF 2 INCHES: THE TURF SHALL BE MOWED THEREAFTER TO SAFELY MAINTAIN THE 2 INCH HEIGHT.e. AT THE TERMINATION OF THE MAINTENANCE AND WARRANTY PERIOD, ALL TURF AREAS SHALL BE LIVE, HEALTHY, UNDAMAGED, AND FREE OF INFESTATIONS. ALL AREAS SHALL BE COMPLETELY VOID OF BARREN SPOTS LARGER THAN 3 INCHES BY 3 INCHES.f. IF ALL PLANTINGS ARE NOT ACCEPTABLE AT THE END OF THE TWO-YEAR PERIOD, THE MAINTENANCE AND WARRANTY PERIOD SHALL CONTINUE UNTIL THE LANDSCAPING MEETS CITY APPROVAL.SITE PLAN
KEYNOTES
1TYPICAL ASPHALT PAVING PER GEOTECH REPORT & CIVIL PLANS
2TYPICAL 6" H CONCRETE CURB
3MONUMENT SIGN - UNDER SEPARATE PERMIT
4REFUSE YARD PER CITY OF GOODYEAR REQUIEMENTS
5BICYCLE PARKING (9 LOOPS)
6FIRE LANE SIGN PER 17/A510
7CONCRETE SIDEWALK RAMP - SEE 3/A500
8PRECAST CONCRETE BUMPER BLOCK - ANCHORED
9ACCESSIBLE ROUTE OF TRAVEL. MIN WIDTH TO BE 4'-0" RUNNING SLOPE SHALL NOT EXCEED 1:20. CROSS SLOPE SHALL NOT EXCEED 1:48 SURFACE TO BE FIRM, STABLE AND SLIP RESISTANT.
10 (circled number)LANDSCAPING
11 (circled number)ELECTRICAL TRANSFORMER AND CONC UTILITY COMPANY CONC. & BOLLARDS PAD BY G.C. PER UTILITY CO. REQ'MNTS
12 (circled number)KNOX LOCK BOX NEAR DOOR AT NO HIGHER THAN 60" ABOVE FINISH GRADE. PROVIDE A FULL SET OF KEYS TO OPEN ALL DOORS INSIDE AND OUTSIDE THE BUILDING, TO INCLUDE FIRE ALARM PANEL - LABELED AND PLACED INSIDE KEY BOX
13 (circled number)FIRE DEPARTMENT CONNECTION
14 (circled number)FIRE RISER INSIDE RISER ROOM IN BUILDING
15SERVICE ENTRANCE SECTION (INSIDE BUILDING)
16EXISTING SIDEWALK
17EXISTING STREET CURB AND GUTTER
186'-0" HIGH CMU SCREEN WALL - TO MATCH EXISTING
19STAGGERED CMU SCREEN WALL - 3' (MIN) ABOVE ADJACENT PARKING SURFACE - SEE 8 & 20/A510
208'-0" H. CMU SCREEN WALL - CMU-1 PER A200
21REMOVE EXISTING CURB AND GUTTER - NEW PAVING TO CONNECT TO EXISTING LOT
22EXISTING FIRE HYDRANT TO BE RELOCATED
23EXISTING LIGHT POLE TO BE RELOCATED
24DECORATIVE CONCRETE SIDEWALK PER 18/A510
25DASHED LINE DENOTES TYPICAL FIRE LANE PAINTED CURB PER 3/A510
26EXISTING TEMPORARY W.I. FENCE TO BE REMOVED
27EV CHARGER. TO BE PROVIDED BY OWNER - GC TO PROVIDE CONCRETE BASE AND PROTECTIVE BOLLARDS PER MANUFACTURER REQUIREMENTS. GC TO INSTALL AND CONNECT CHARGER. SEE ELECTRICAL AND STRUCTURAL FOR FURTHER INFORMATION
AN ERRCS MAY BE REQUIRED TO BE INSTALLED IN THE BUILDING IN ORDER TO ENHANCE THE EMERGENCY RESPONDER RADIO COVERAGE. A CERTIFIED TEST SHALL BE PERFORMED AT THE END OF CONSTRUCTION TO DEMONSTRATE THAT A SYSTEM IS NOT REQUIRED. IF THE TEST FAILS, A CERTIFICATION OF OCCUPANCY CANNOT BE ISSUED UNTIL THE SYSTEM IS INSTALLED.
SYMBOLS<::symbol of a circle with a cross inside and "FH" next to it: symbol::> FIRE HYDRANT - SEE CIVIL<::symbol of a square with a triangle on top and a smaller square below it: symbol::> LIGHT POLE ON CONCRETE BASE<::diagram of a rectangle with dimensions 9' x 20' representing a parking space: diagram::> TYPICAL ORDINANCE REQUIRED PARKING SPACE<::diagram of two concentric dashed arcs with radii 28' and 48': diagram::> DENOTES FIRE TRUCK TURNING RADII
PROJECT DATA
PROJECT NAME: PROJECT ADDRESS: OWNER:RODEO FORD PRO ELITE TRUCK SERVICE (TBD) W. TEST DRIVE PRESLY INVESTMENTS, LLC 7300 W. ORCHID LN
ARCHITECT:CHANDLER, AZ 85226 JOHN MAHONEY ARCHITECT LLC 850 W. ELLIOT ROAD #108 TEMPE, ARIZONA 85284
ZONING:PALM VALLEY CROSSINGS PAD (ORD. NO. 05-523, AS AMENDED BY ORD. NO. 11-1124) ARC/SC AND ARC/MODIFIED C-2 LAND USE DESIGNATION
ASSESSOR'S PARCEL NUMBER:500-03-546
SITE AREA:LOT 5: 187,997 S.F. (4.3 ACRES)
FLOOR AREA PROVIDED:GROUND FLOOR = 52,373 S.F. SECOND FLOOR = 8,915 S.F. TOTAL AREA = 61,288 S.F.
LOT COVERAGE: MAX. LOT COVERAGE ALLOWED: CONSTRUCTION TYPE BUILDING HEIGHT ALLOWED:52,373 / 187,997 = 28% 60% II-B 56 FEET (W/ADD 10' ARCH EMBELLISHMENTS)
BUILDING HEIGHT PROVIDED:28'-0"
LANDSCAPING REQ'D: 15% LANDSCAPING PROVIDED:187,997 x .15 = 28,200 SF 31,200 SF
SIGNAGE FOR REFERENCE ONLY. ALL SIGNAGE BY SEPARATE REVIEW AND APPROVAL.
THIS SITE IS LOCATED WITHIN LIGHTING ZONE 2.
SPEED BUMPS OR TRAFFIC CALMING ELEMENTS ARE NOT ALLOWED ON FIRE LANES
PARKING REQUIREMENTS: 1 SPACE PER 300 S.F. OF INDOOR FLOOR AREA - SERVICE RECEPTION CANOPY AREA NOT INCLUDED IN BUILDING AREA FOR REQUIRED PARKING 53,058/300 = 187 SPACES REQUIRED (6 ACCESSIBLE) PARKING PROVIDED = 88 SPACES ON SITE (6 ACCESSIBLE) 99 SPACES ON EXISTING SITE VIA PARKING AGREEMENT - SAME ENTITY OWNS BOTH PARCELS.
BICYCLE PARKING REQUIRED = 1 PER 10 REQUIRED PARKING SPACES = 18 (9 LOOPS)
EXISTING QUICK LANE BUILDING (NO CHANGE - SEE CASE 17-600-00006) PARKING REQUIRED = 57 PARKING PROVIDED = 60 (NO CHANGE) - DESIGNATED WITH "e"
<::Vicinity map showing an area with several roads and an interstate. The interstate is labeled "I-10" at the top. Below the interstate, there's "W. TEST DR." and a shaded area labeled "SITE" to its right. Further south, "W. AUTO DR." runs horizontally. Vertical roads include "N. LITCHFIELD ROAD" on the far left, "N. 137TH AVE." to its right, "N. CENTRAL AVE." to the right of the site, and "N. DYSART ROAD" on the far right. "W. VAN BUREN STREET" runs horizontally at the bottom of the map section. Below the map, the title "VICINITY MAP" is displayed, along with "N.T.S." and a compass rose indicating North.: map::> <::logo: JOHN MAHONEY ARCHITECT JOHN MAHONEY ARCHITECT 850 W. ELLIOT ROAD #108 TEMPE, ARIZONA 85284 www.mahoneyarch.com REGISTERED ARCHITECT CERTIFICATE NO. 13729 JOHN H. MAHONEY Date Signed 8/30/24 ARIZONA, U.S.A. EXPIRES ON 9/30/27 The logo features a black rectangular border, a curved line above the company name, and a circular seal with registration details and a handwritten signature. ::> RODEO FORD PRO ELITE TRUCK SERVICE CENTER XXXX W. TEST DRIVE GOODYEAR, ARIZONA PROJECT NO • 2311
PROJECT NO.: 2311
ISSUE DATE: 7/18/24
SITE PLAN
A101
